title: Byte Pair Encoding Merge Process
description: Interactive flowchart showing how Byte Pair Encoding iteratively merges the most frequent character pairs to build a subword vocabulary used by large language model tokenizers.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

educational.learningObjective: Explain how Byte Pair Encoding builds a subword vocabulary by iteratively merging the most frequent character pairs.
